selections.name: Above The Law
selections.reason: Drops from State Metro class at Warwick Farm to Provincial level. Consistent recent form with placings in all three starts this prep. Drawn well to get a soft run.

selections.name: Strike A Pose
selections.reason: Set the pace and fought on well for second at Canberra last start. Elite stable (Maher) and will be prominent early.

selections.name: Solid (NZ)
selections.reason: Hawkes-trained gelding who showed improvement third-up last prep. Faded late last start but strips fitter here.

selections.name: Demmo Dermy
selections.reason: Tired late after doing work up front last start. Has the inside draw to conserve energy and can feature in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Strike A Pose
danger_horse.reason: Maher-trained runner with tactical speed who can dictate terms if allowed.

selections.name: Whoa Nellie
selections.reason: Resuming after a five-month break. Showed excellent ability on debut preparation and has trialed well leading into this.

selections.name: What A Gent
selections.reason: Gets a significant weight advantage carrying only 55kg. Second-up today and should improve off his recent Wyong run.

selections.name: Populism
selections.reason: Lightly raced filly from the Waugh yard. Fair effort at Gosford last start and the extra trip should suit her running style.

selections.name: Hold My Drink
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Sat on the speed last start and boxed on well. Good draw ensures an economical trip.

danger_horse.name: What A Gent
danger_horse.reason: The light weight gives him a mathematical edge if he can replicate his best form.

selections.name: Tequisoda
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from Elite Metro grade at Randwick. Excellent fresh record and drawn perfectly in barrier 2.

selections.name: The New Sinatra
selections.reason: Won well at Hawkesbury two starts back. Forgive the last run where he was outclassed. Can bounce back here.

selections.name: Call Me Mojo
selections.reason: Broke maiden status impressively at Canberra last start. Progressive type who can handle the step up in grade.

selections.name: Prince Harrison
selections.reason: Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race. Placed at Wyong last start and will be closing late.

danger_horse.name: The New Sinatra
danger_horse.reason: Proven at this level and has the tactical speed to overcome the wider draw.

selections.name: Ishikari (NZ)
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a dominant win in a Randwick Highway race. Elite Metro form is vastly superior to this field. Clear top pick.

selections.name: Audenzia
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and fought hard for second at this track last start. Will make her own luck up front.

selections.name: Benamera
selections.reason: Won well at Canberra last start. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability to figure in the finish.

selections.name: Urafiki
selections.reason: Forgive last start at Hawkesbury. Won a strong race at Canberra prior and gets the inside run here.

danger_horse.name: Audenzia
danger_horse.reason: Track specialist who will be in it for a long way if she gets cheap sectionals.

selections.name: I've Bean Tryin'
selections.reason: Class runner of the field dropping from State Metro grade. Overcomes the weight penalty with raw class. Wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Chix
selections.reason: Second-up today after a fair effort at Newcastle. Won well fresh last prep and should strip much fitter.

selections.name: Laurel Hill
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to fire. Placed at this track two starts back and gets a soft run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Marsabit (IRE)
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell. Has Elite Metro form lines from last prep and can run a cheeky race fresh from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Chix
danger_horse.reason: Progressive filly who has upside and can challenge the top weight if he gets caught wide.

selections.name: Chicama
selections.reason: Resuming after five months. Drops from State Metro grade and gets a massive advantage from barrier 1 in this sprint. Class prevails.

selections.name: Zounaka
selections.reason: Also drops from State Metro class and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Excellent fresh record and will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Peleus
selections.reason: Broke maiden impressively at Hawkesbury last start. Progressive gelding who can handle the step up in grade.

selections.name: Divo
selections.reason: Another dropping from State Metro grade. Placed at Canterbury last prep and has trialed well leading into this.

danger_horse.name: Zounaka
danger_horse.reason: Ratings are identical to the top pick; a legitimate co-favorite who will get a dream run.
